steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content:
The equation $|18-2x|=66$ means the inside expression can equal $66$ or $-66$.
$18-2x=66$
$18-2x=-66$

steps.title: Find the possible values
steps.content:
Solve each case, then compute $9-x$.
First case: $18-2x=66$, so $-2x=48$, $x=-24$, and $9-x=33$.
Second case: $18-2x=-66$, so $-2x=-84$, $x=42$, and $9-x=-33$.

steps.title: Match the listed value
steps.content: The possible values of $9-x$ are $33$ and $-33$. Only $33$ is listed. The answer is C.
